title: Faktoriyel Hesaplama
subtitle: Recursive ve iteratif faktoriyel.
code:
def factorial_recursive(n)
  return 1 if n <= 1
  n * factorial_recursive(n - 1)
end

def factorial_iterative(n)
  result = 1
  (2..n).each { |i| result *= i }
  result
end

puts "Faktoriyel tablosu (0-10):"
(0..10).each do |i|
  puts "#{i}! = #{factorial_iterative(i)}"
end

puts "\nRecursive 5! = #{factorial_recursive(5)}"
puts "Iteratif 5! = #{factorial_iterative(5)}"

# Kombinasyon hesaplama: C(n,r) = n! / (r! * (n-r)!)
n, r = 5, 2
combination = factorial_iterative(n) / (factorial_iterative(r) * factorial_iterative(n - r))
puts "\nC(#{n},#{r}) = #{combination}"
